message:
feat: Improve indexing performance and add optimization beads

Indexing improvements:
- Add embedding content hash deduplication and reuse
- Implement batched SQLite operations with safe batch size limits
- Add FTS table rebuild and database optimize functions
- Support multi-part tweet files (tweets-part*.js)
- Add deduplication for parsed tweets

Beads updates:
- Create comprehensive performance optimization bead structure
- Add unit test tasks for all optimization features
- Add E2E performance validation test script task
- Establish proper dependency chain for implementation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
